commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore runtime imports stripped by Phase 8 type-import cleanup

RequiredFieldsForm and CalendarView are JSX components, not TypeScript types.
Marking them as `type` imports causes the bundler to strip them at compile
time, resulting in a ReferenceError at render. Removed the `type` keyword.

Fix TrueNAS %% prompt: guard against LOCAL_OPTIONS reverting setopt

When LOCAL_OPTIONS is set by the system zshrc, setopt changes inside
functions revert on return — so PROMPT_PERCENT was being unset right
before the prompt rendered. Fix by adding NO_LOCAL_OPTIONS to the precmd
hook and also setting PROMPT_PERCENT directly in the zshrc body.

commit.message:
fix(cli): run container as feliz user to avoid root/agent conflicts

Set USER feliz in Dockerfile so both the entrypoint and
`docker compose exec` commands run as the non-root feliz user.
This eliminates the --dangerously-skip-permissions root error
without needing gosu wrappers in every agent adapter.

The entrypoint no longer needs root for chown (volumes inherit
ownership from container dirs on first creation) or gosu for
privilege dropping.

feat: robust tool installs with timeout, retry, reconcile (Phase 6B) (#229)

* feat: robust tool installs with timeout, retry, reconcile (Phase 6B)

Tool installation at agent startup was fragile: no exec timeout (downloads
could hang indefinitely), no retry on transient failure, hardcoded binary
scripts, no reconcile path for running agents, and no 'installing' status
for real-time visibility.

Phase 6B closes these gaps:
- Add timeoutMs to execInContainerWithExit (30s builtin, 120s apt, 300s binary)
- Retry non-builtin tools once on failure (configurable via env)
- Code-driven deterministic binary install contract (BINARY_PATH_OVERRIDES)
- New 'installing' status with migration 027
- POST /agents/:id/reconcile-tools endpoint for running agents
- UI: blue 'installing' badge + admin-only Reconcile button
- 20 new tests (12 unit, 5 route, 3 UI) + OpenAPI source/mirror parity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clamp retry env parsing to prevent NaN skipping installs

parseInt of a non-numeric HILL90_TOOL_INSTALL_RETRIES yields NaN,
which would cause the retry loop to never execute. Clamp to integer
>= 0 with default 1 on invalid input. Added jest.resetModules test
proving NaN env still retries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle in E2E tests

Grafana dashboards continuously query Prometheus, which in CI has no
data. This prevents networkidle from ever completing, causing 30s
timeouts on every goto() call. With 24 tests × 3 attempts × 30s =
~36 min, exceeding the 30-min job timeout.

Switch all goto/wait calls to domcontentloaded — the dashboard DOM
loads fine, only Prometheus XHR never settles. _wait_for_dashboard()
still checks for viz panel rendering with a 10s timeout and skips
data-dependent tests when panels don't render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Agregar get_assignments(): lista top-level en YAML (no embebida en usuario)
- Actualizar assign_client_to_consultant() con param assigned_by
- Agregar unassign_client() como metodo principal
- Mantener unassign_client_from_consultant() como alias de compatibilidad
- Storage migrado a clave 'assignments' separada en users.yaml
- Admin Panel: pasar assigned_by al crear asignacion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Convert [slug].js heading backing from SVG text to CSS divs

Replaces SVG text-based backing with CSS div layers that exactly match
the H1.tsx and H2.tsx React component rendering. Key changes:
- Uses -webkit-text-stroke instead of SVG stroke-width
- Matching layer colors, offsets, and stroke widths from H1.tsx/H2.tsx
- Adds rotateY (-2deg for H1, -1.5deg for H2) to match components
- Shared SVG filters (saa-sharp-h1, saa-sharp-h2) injected once
- No resize handler needed (CSS divs reflow naturally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: DashboardLayout reads user/org data from localStorage as fallback

Pages like knowledge-base render DashboardLayout without props, causing
the header to show 'User (school)' and hiding the logout button. Now
DashboardLayout falls back to localStorage for userName, userEmail, and
orgName when props are not provided, and always provides a default
onLogout handler.

feat: v2.0 — self-contained plugin, remove auth_oauth2 dependency

Refactor auth_telegram to be fully self-contained using only Moodle
core APIs. No auth_oauth2 plugin required.

Changes:
- Merge test.php widget rendering into index.php (dual-mode page)
- Rewrite signup.php as email-only form; route to create_user or
  send_confirm_link_login_email based on whether email already exists
- Restore classes/api.php, linked_login.php, telegram.php, confirm-link.php
- Remove classes/client.php, helper.php, missingfields.php, test.php
- Remove issuerid/oauth2heading from settings.php
- Restore auth_telegram_linked_login table in db/install.xml
- Upgrade step 2026030100: only migrate users when table is newly created
- Upgrade step 2026030200: drop v1.4 columns (usermodified+index,
  telegramusername, email); clean up stale issuerid config
- Restore confirmation email strings; remove OAuth2 strings from lang files
- Bump version to 2026030200 (2.0.0)
